description: A square graphic. The upper portion shows, from behind, two officers in dark jackets lettered POLICE HSI escorting a handcuffed man in a light blue shirt across a parking lot toward parked cars. A dark blue panel across the bottom carries white text reading Criminals don't get second chances. They get handed to ICE., the last clause in italics.
notable_text: POLICE HSI; Criminals don't get second chances. They get handed to ICE.
